race.description: Nutrien Equine Standardbred Classic Series F (L)
race.comment: A wide draw on the back row presents a challenge for WILLOWS GIRL (14) but her form this time in suggests she is the class filly of this race. She drew on the outside of the front line in her heat here last week but pushed forward to lead and then dug deep when challenged. That was her fifth win in six starts this time in, highlighted by her G2 Gold Bracelet success. Banking on class and a touch of luck to get her home. EYE WISH (7) continued her good form when just a neck off WILLOWS GIRL last week. That was the second time she has placed to that filly this campaign, coming from the back row to finish 3.6m off her in the Gold Bracelet. She could use her front row draw to turn the tables. GO EASY ON ME (12) drew wide and worked but was too good last week. Another that may need things to go her way from the second line but she hasn't missed the top-three this time in so is hard to knock. RACHELS LEGACY (8) is racing well and did manage a win from this barrier here two back so respect.
